pr.title: [WIP] Non-record: Local Ablation Pipeline — EMA + Int6 + Partial RoPE (GTX 1650)

output.summary: Ported EMA smoothing, Int6 clip-search quantization, partial RoPE, LN scaling, and decoupled weight decay into a GTX 1650 local ablation pipeline ahead of leaderboard scaling.
techniques: EMA smoothing with Muon/AdamW decoupled weight decay
Int6 clip-search quantization tuned for zlib compression
Partial RoPE plus LN scaling on constrained hardware
